title.default: MK Widget Card | Modern eCard & Widget Ecosystem

metadata.description: MK Widget Card is a digital business card (eCard), smart QR code, and home screen widget ecosystem for iOS and Android.

og.title: MK Widget Card | Digital Identity 2026
og.description: Create professional digital cards, integrate smart QR codes, and bring important info to your home screen with MK Widget Card.

hero.title: Modern eCard & Widget Ecosystem.
hero.desc: MK Widget Card helps you create professional digital business cards, integrate smart QR codes, and bring important information directly to your home screen through a seamless Widget system on iOS and Android.

ecard.title: Smart eCard QR
ecard.description: Create digital business cards and vCard-compliant contact QR codes to share professional information in an instant.

widget.title: Widget Experience
widget.description: Bring your profile, QR codes, and important shortcuts directly to your home screen through a smooth Widget system.

privacy.title: Security & Privacy
privacy.description: Data is stored locally and securely synced via App Groups, ensuring you always own your personal information.

save.title: Quick Contact Save
save.description: Scan someone else's eCard code and save it directly to your phone contacts automatically and accurately.

productSection.title: Comprehensive Digital Identity Solution.
productSection.description: MK Widget Card provides a closed-loop process from profile creation and smart QR code management to instant information display on your phone's home screen.

gallerySection.title: Intuitive and Modern App Interface.
gallerySection.description: Explore the main functional screens of MK Widget Card, optimized for user experience on both iOS and Android.

gallery.title: eCard Setup

gallery.title: vCard QR Code

gallery.title: Home Screen Utility

gallery.title: Scan & Save Contacts

modulesSection.title: Flexible Component System.
modulesSection.description: MK Widget Card is built on a modular structure, allowing you to customize your card with various types of information according to your needs.

modules.name: Personal Profile
modules.description: Display your name, title, avatar, and short bio professionally.

modules.name: Contact QR
modules.description: Integrated vCard QR code helps others save your contact info with just one tap.

modules.name: Payment QR
modules.description: Supports VietQR, MoMo, or bank account information for convenient transactions.

modules.name: Social Links
modules.description: Gather all your Website, Facebook, LinkedIn, GitHub links into a single card.

modules.name: Widget Customization
modules.description: Customize Widget colors, sizes, and styles to match your home screen aesthetic.

modules.name: Plugin System
modules.description: Flexible modular structure allows you to easily toggle information components on your eCard.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for MK Widget Card, covering local eCard data, QR scanning, device permissions and Widget sync.
privacy.label: Privacy Policy
privacy.title: Privacy Policy - MK Widget Card.
privacy.lastUpdated: Last updated: May 12, 2026. This policy describes how the MK Widget Card app collects, uses, and protects your information.
privacy.summaryDesc: The app prioritizes local storage. Camera and Contact permissions are only used for scanning and saving eCards. We do not collect your personal data on our servers.

sections.title: 1. General Principles
body: MK Widget Card is designed to be privacy-first and local-first. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal data of our users.
The app operates primarily by storing data directly on your device. We do not collect sensitive data on our servers unless necessary for specific functions such as push notifications.

sections.title: 2. Data You Provide
body: eCard Information: Name, title, email, phone number, social networks, and links that you actively enter to create a digital business card.
QR Data: Information contained in the QR codes you create or scan through the app.
Widget Configuration: Display options you set to bring information to your home screen.

sections.title: 3. Device Access Permissions
body: Camera: Used to scan QR codes of business cards from other users. We do not store images or videos from the camera other than the decoded QR code content.
Contacts: Allows you to save information from scanned eCards directly to your phone's contacts. The app only writes new information and does not read or upload your existing contacts to our servers.
Notifications: Used to send important updates or reminders. We use Expo Push Tokens to identify the device receiving notifications anonymously.

sections.title: 4. Storage and Syncing
body: Local Storage: All your personal information and eCards are stored securely on your device's memory (Using App Groups on iOS to share data between the App and Widget).
Widget Syncing: Data is shared internally between the main app and the home screen utility (Widget) to display information quickly without opening the app.

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Services
body: Expo: We use Expo's infrastructure to handle push notifications.
App Store & Google Play: Downloads and payments (if any) are handled by Apple and Google platforms according to their own policies.

sections.title: 6. Data Security
body: We apply standard security measures to protect your data on the device. Since the data is on your machine, we encourage you to use the operating system's security features (such as FaceID, fingerprint, or device password).
We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal data to third parties.

sections.title: 7. Updates and Contact
body: This policy may be updated to reflect new features of the app. Any changes will be updated on this page.
If you have any questions, please contact us via email: contact@tranminhkhoi.dev

terms.metaDescription: Terms of service for MK Widget Card, including app use, user content, intellectual property and service limitations.
terms.label: Terms
terms.title: Terms of Service - MK Widget Card.
terms.lastUpdated: Last updated: May 12, 2026. These terms govern your use of our app and accompanying services.
terms.contactDesc: Any questions about the terms of service, please contact us via email:

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By downloading, installing, or using the MK Widget Card app, you agree to comply with these terms of use. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

sections.title: 2. Intellectual Property Rights
sections.body: All content, source code, design, logo, and other intellectual property assets related to MK Widget Card are owned by Tran Minh Khoi. You may not copy, modify, or distribute them without written consent.

sections.title: 3. User Content
sections.body: You are fully responsible for the personal information, links, and data you enter into the app to create eCards. You commit that the information provided is accurate and does not violate laws or third-party rights.

sections.title: 4. Use of Service
sections.body: The app is provided for the purpose of creating digital business cards and managing contact information. You may not use the app for any illegal or harmful purpose, including spamming or impersonating others.

sections.title: 5. Disclaimer
sections.body: The app is provided 'as is'. We do not guarantee that the app will be error-free or always available. We are not responsible for any data loss or damage arising from the use of the app.

sections.title: 6. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Your continued use of the app after changes constitute your acceptance of the new terms.
